body:
# Avi Parrack

**Role:** Visiting Scholar

[Avi Parrack](https://www.linkedin.com/in/aviparrack/) is a PhD student in physics at Stanford and researcher at the [SLAC National Accelerator Laboratory](https://www6.slac.stanford.edu/). Previously, he was a student researcher at [NASA JPL](https://www.jpl.nasa.gov/) and at [UCLA’s Particle Beam Physics Laboratory](http://pbpl.physics.ucla.edu/index.html). He graduated with a BS in Physics from UCLA.
